audio_description: The audio features a male voice speaking in a neutral tone at a moderate pace, with no significant background noise or emotional inflection.
temporal_description: In a dimly lit, tiled room with framed pictures on the wall and a red decorative item on a door, five men are gathered. One man in a patterned shirt stands facing an older man in a gray suit, holding his hand in a handshake. Two other men stand nearby, one with his hands clasped near his face, and another partially obscured behind them. The man in the patterned shirt gestures with his free hand while speaking, and later, another man pulls out a phone, showing it to the man in the patterned shirt, who examines it. The men maintain mostly upright postures, with their gazes directed toward each other, indicating a focused interaction.
